title: ASR Outdoor 4pc Gemstone Prospecting Kit with Trowels Sieve and Collection Vial
description:
Start uncovering hidden treasures with the ASR Outdoor 4pc Gemstone Prospecting Kit, a compact and practical set designed for digging, sifting, and collecting gemstones in the field. Whether you're exploring creeks, riverbeds, beaches, or working through paydirt, this kit includes the essential tools needed to help you find and keep your discoveries. The kit features a bright orange 11" heavy-duty trowel, perfect for digging through soil, gravel, and compact dirt. Its durable design and high-visibility color make it easy to locate while working outdoors.

ASR Outdoor 4pc Gemstone Prospecting Kit with Trowels Sieve and Collection Vial

Start uncovering hidden treasures with the ASR Outdoor 4pc Gemstone Prospecting Kit, a compact and practical set designed for digging, sifting, and collecting gemstones in the field. Whether you're exploring creeks, riverbeds, beaches, or working through paydirt, this kit includes the essential tools needed to help you find and keep your discoveries.

The kit features a bright orange 11" heavy-duty trowel, perfect for digging through soil, gravel, and compact dirt. Its durable design and high-visibility color make it easy to locate while working outdoors.

Key Features

  • COMPLETE 4PC GOLD PROSPECTING KIT - Includes a heavy-duty digging trowel, sand sifter sieve, large sand scoop, and a glass vial for collecting and storing fine gold finds.
  • STACKABLE SAND SIFTER SIEVE - Durable 9.75" sieve with 36 holes per square inch for efficient sorting of gems and minerals. Please note that sifter colors ship at random.
  • DURABLE 11” DIGGING TROWEL - Bright orange heavy-duty trowel designed for digging through soil, gravel, and paydirt while remaining easy to spot outdoors.
  • LARGE 12.5” SAND SCOOP - Heavy-duty green plastic scoop makes collecting sand and gravel fast and efficient while remaining lightweight and easy to carry.
  • STORE YOUR TREASURES - Includes a 2 dram glass collection vial for safely storing small gemstones, minerals, or other discoveries made in the field.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASR-RTUNG3-84JF
  • UPC: 810131703233
  • Color: Assorted
  • Size: 4pc

To help separate gems from dirt and sand, the set includes a 9.75" sand sifter sieve with 36 holes per square inch. This durable, stackable sieve quickly filters material to reveal rocks, minerals, and gemstones hidden below the surface. Sieve colors ship at random.

For collecting larger amounts of sand or paydirt, the kit also includes a 12.5" heavy-duty green plastic sand scoop. Lightweight yet durable, this scoop makes gathering and transporting sand easy while allowing material to drain quickly.

Once you’ve discovered something special, store it safely in the included 2 dram glass collection vial, ideal for protecting small gemstones, minerals, or other interesting finds during your prospecting trip.

Lightweight and easy to carry, this kit is great for gemstone hunting, rock hounding, beachcombing, educational activities, and outdoor exploration.
